conventions.name: GitHubHelper() Zero-Arg Constructor
conventions.description: GitHubHelper() takes NO arguments. Token from env. Repo goes on every method call, not constructor.

conventions.name: WSL Push with GH_TOKEN
conventions.description: WSL cannot use Windows credential manager. Push via: git push https://user:${GH_TOKEN}@github.com/owner/repo.git branch

conventions.name: Real-Time Comment Protocol
conventions.description: Post to GitHub issue before displaying to user. User messages posted verbatim. Post first, display second.
